name: Stratton Air National Guard
description_short: Stratton Air National Guard Federal Credit Union is a community-focused credit union serving Scotia, NY, offering checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and investment planning services to members.
description_long:
Stratton Air National Guard Federal Credit Union (FCU) operates as a member-owned financial cooperative serving the Scotia, New York community and surrounding areas. The credit union is federally chartered and regulated by the NCUA, providing traditional and modern financial services to its membership base. Founded to serve Air National Guard members and their families, the institution has evolved to serve broader community financial needs while maintaining its cooperative principles.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts (Share Draft Accounts), auto loans for both new and used vehicles, mortgage financing, share certificates, online and mobile banking, investment planning, and wealth management services. They provide competitive rates, with new auto loans starting at 2.75% APR and used auto loans at 3.75% APR according to NCUA data. Additional offerings include bill pay, debit card services, ATM access, financial calculators, and dedicated financial planning support for members seeking to manage their finances effectively.

Stratton Air National Guard FCU distinguishes itself through personalized member service, low minimum balance requirements for share certificates, exclusive member benefits and discounts, and a focus on financial education and planning. The institution maintains physical branch locations with extended hours and provides modern digital banking capabilities alongside traditional services. Their approach emphasizes both accessibility and comprehensive financial guidance tailored to personal and business needs.

While the credit union provides legitimate, federally-regulated financial services, potential members should note that membership eligibility may be restricted (historically to Air National Guard affiliates), and the institution serves a relatively modest membership base. The website reports 0 checking accounts and approximately 6 new auto loan members and 29 used auto loan members, suggesting a small, niche membership. Prospective customers should confirm membership eligibility and compare rates with larger credit unions before opening an account.
services: Checking accounts (Share Draft Accounts) with debit cards and check writing
Online banking and mobile banking platforms for account management
New auto loans with rates starting at 2.75% APR
Used auto loans with rates starting at 3.75% APR
Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinancing
Savings accounts with competitive interest rates
Share certificates with low minimum balance requirements
Wealth management and financial planning consultation
Bill pay and automatic payment services
Financial calculators (auto loan, mortgage, savings, credit card payoff)
pros: Federally insured by NCUA, providing deposit protection up to $250,000 per account
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 2.75% for new vehicles and 3.75% for used vehicles
Comprehensive financial services including online banking, mobile banking, and bill pay in one institution
Share certificates with low minimum balance requirements to help members build savings
Dedicated financial planning and wealth management services for personalized guidance
Physical branch locations in Scotia, NY with accessible customer service hours
Member-owned cooperative structure with exclusive benefits and discounts for account holders
cons: Potentially restricted membership eligibility (historically Air National Guard-affiliated members only)
Small membership base (under 35 reported auto loan members) may limit service resources and branch network
Limited online presence and marketing presence compared to regional or national credit unions
No mention of credit cards, lines of credit, or other consumer lending products on website
Uncertain membership enrollment process and eligibility verification requirements not clearly detailed
best_for: Active and retired Air National Guard members and their families seeking member-owned banking
Scotia, NY community residents looking for personalized, local credit union services
Borrowers seeking competitive auto loan rates with flexible terms and direct member service
Individuals wanting investment and retirement planning guidance from a trusted local institution
diagnosis: Stratton Air National Guard FCU is best for current and former Air National Guard members and Scotia, NY residents seeking community-focused, federally-insured banking with competitive auto and mortgage rates. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is likely restricted and should be verified before applying; potential members should also confirm the credit union's service areas and full product availability compared to larger regional alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
